title: Physical activity practice among older adults
authors: Paulo Roberto Borges de Souza Júnior
abstract: In addition to the association with marital status and health promotion programs, there were significant sex and educational level inequalities in physical activity decline later in life. These findings help the identification of groups more vulnerable to decreased physical activity levels with aging, as well as the planning of health promotion strategies, especially in older groups.
subject: Medicine
Demography
Gerontology
Psychology
Physical therapy
Internal medicine
